violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Machine was primed and sanitizing chemical was replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The cutting board for steam table is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
Chemical dispenser at 3 bay sink observed leaking when not in use. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and wall by juice dispensing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
Kitchen hood vents were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
Lined FRP shelves near toast area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of the robot coupe and can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024

1. The cutting board on the steam table line is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC removed cutting board from line during time of inspection. COS. 2. Gaskets for 2 door refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. 3. Junctures of 3 bay sink basins were observed in poor repair. Material is beginning to erode. Caulking is peeling off. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment to effectively wash, rinse, and sanitize. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. shelf and surrounding area near juice station 2. ice accumulation observed in interior of chest freezers 3. the top side of the ice machine 4. walls near cookline and dishmachine Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The condensate from 1. AC unit is draining into sanitizing basin of 3 bay sink 2. condensate line from juice dispenser is draining onto table. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain or other appropriate manner. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2024
Lined FRP shelves near toast area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils toaster was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

Ham(deli-meats) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
A splashguard is needed at the hand-sink in the kitchen, between the hand sink and the bread rack. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
2 door reach-in Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator, chest freezers, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The floor under oven/stove and juice unit in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
